name: Chicken Salad with Black Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. SOAK THE BLACK BEANS IN WATER for 15 minutes. Drain and discard the water.
2. Meanwhile, cook the snow peas in boiling salted water for 30 seconds.
3. Immediately drain and plunge into ice water to chill. Drain again, dry on a towel, cut lengthwise into thin julienne strips and set aside.
4. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine the black beans with the sherry. Cook over high heat for 1 minute.
5. Add broth, garlic, ginger, and powdered ginger. Bring almost to a boil and reduce heat to low.
6. Add the chicken breasts and simmer for 4 minutes. Remove from heat and let steep, covered, for 5 minutes.
7. Remove the chicken breasts to a plate and return the pan to the stove. Place over medium heat and cook uncovered for 5 minutes, reducing the liquid by one-third.
8. Pour the mixture into a mixing bowl, let cool for 10 minutes, then transfer to a blender. Run on medium, slowly add both oils.
9. When ready to serve, pour the sauce onto a platter. Place a pile of snow peas in the center and slice the chicken diagonally across the grain into thin strips.
10. Fan the chicken breasts around the snow peas, arrange vegetables around the chicken, and sprinkle with cilantro.
